faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Yes, we only supply original OEM parts manufactured by Hyundai, Kia, and Genesis directly from Korea.
faq.a2: Delivery takes 7 to 14 business days depending on your country and chosen shipping method.
faq.a3: After submitting your request, our manager will contact you and offer convenient payment options. We accept bank transfers and popular payment systems.
faq.a4: Yes, if the part doesn't fit or has a factory defect, we'll arrange a return or replacement. Contact our manager within 14 days of receiving it.
faq.q5: How do I check a car's VIN?
faq.a5: Use our Telegram bot @caranalizer_bot — it will verify the history of any Korean car by VIN code for free.
faq.a6: We ship parts to most countries via EMS and other international delivery services.

footer.description: Korean car verification and genuine OEM parts. Hyundai, Kia, Genesis.
